item.title: My First Post
item.description:
Hello Hugo + Docsy

This is my first blog post.

Why Hugo?

I chose Hugo because:

  • It is fast
  • It generates static websites
  • It works well with GitHub Pages
  • Markdown makes writing easy

My goals

I will use this blog to document:

  • Learning notes
  • Engineering projects
  • AI experiments
  • Technical discoveries

Thanks for visiting!

item.title: About
item.description:
CHEN Jie (PhD)

GenAI Specialist, Fast Learner and Willing to Take Challenges

📧 cjdyx2012@gmail.com | cjdyx2020@163.com | 💼 Linkedin

Personal Summary

PhD-educated GenAI Specialist with strong mathematical foundations and a proven track record of deploying production-grade RAG systems in the financial and technology sectors. Experienced in building high-performance GenAI solutions, data extraction pipelines, and automated benchmarking frameworks using a spec-driven, contract-first architecture. Adept at establishing clear technical specifications to standardize cross-functional delivery across distributed teams, and skilled in communicating the core intuition of complex quantitative and AI models to key stakeholders. Proficient in Python, SQL, AWS, and Databricks.
